steps.assistant_text: Cross-module masked-twin sweep grouped gl_func_0006F534 with the matched kernel func_80006110 in a strict 56-insn signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison showed 0 non-reloc diffs. Both are libultra osSetThreadPri. Ported the kernel donor C verbatim (including the (Thread*)(void*) double-cast that pins the t-reg allocno pair) to game_libs_ido53_6F534.c at IDO 5.3 -O1. All five OS-API callees collapse to the address-0 placeholder gl_func_00000000; the two distinct globals (running-thread ptr + run-queue head) map to the two distinct zero-resolving placeholders D_00000000 / gl_data_00000000 -- kept SEPARATE so IDO does not CSE them (a single symbol would renumber the t-reg pair). Spliced into game_libs_post1b2c.c.o via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY (0xc4->0xe0, 15 donor relocs imported). Prior agent had decoded the structure but left it INCLUDE_ASM pending the distinct-D_-alias requirement; this resolves it.
